$comment: Declarative registry of the Cloudflare API token this repo's deploy broker relies on. METADATA ONLY — the token's secret value lives only in Cloudflare as a Worker Secret, never in GitHub and never in git.

tokens.name: cf-broker-bdelanghe-deploy-master
tokens.purpose: Minting credential for the cf-broker-bdelanghe-deploy Worker — mints short-lived, zone-pinned DNS tokens per GitHub OIDC request from this repo's apply workflow. Not used by any workflow directly.
tokens.secret_ref: Cloudflare Worker Secret CF_BROKER_TOKEN on the cf-broker-bdelanghe-deploy Worker
tokens.value_location: Cloudflare only (Worker Secret) — never in GitHub, never in git
tokens.rotation: Auto-expires 2027-06-28. To rotate: mint a replacement with the same scope, `wrangler secret put CF_BROKER_TOKEN --name cf-broker-bdelanghe-deploy`, then revoke the old one. Account-admin-equivalent for minting (API Tokens:Edit isn't subset-limited); direct DNS power is bounded to robertdelanghe.dev. Treat any leak as incident-grade.
